final_prompt.prompt:
Create a 3×3 grid poster for Xiaohongshu (Little Red Book) — a 9-panel layout designed for slicing into 9 individual posts.

Style/medium: needs a clean, premium, "小红书爆款" aesthetic — exact stylistic restraint is yours
Composition: must be 3 columns × 3 rows grid layout with clear boundaries between panels, each panel centered and complete, no text near split lines, obvious spacing or thin borders for clean cropping
Subject: must include sleep/relaxation themed elements across panels: soft bed, moon, pillow, eye mask, warm lamp, curtains, hot milk, aromatherapy, books, AC, thermometer, coffee cup, bathtub steam, notebook, pen, clock, breathing visualization lines
Scene/backdrop: must be cream-white, light beige, pale oatmeal, soft caramel color palette with minimal deep brown text accents — exact color values are yours
Lighting/mood: needs a gentle, healing, sleep-therapy atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: must be warm cream, beige, oatmeal, caramel tones with deep brown text
Materials/textures: needs a soft, tactile, light skeuomorphic illustration style — exact material treatment is yours
Text (verbatim): must include all Chinese text across 9 panels:
  Panel 1 (cover): "让你倒头就睡的8个 tips" (large title), "失眠党、熬夜党一定要收藏" (subtitle)
  Panel 2: "1. 睡前1小时别玩手机" (title), "蓝光会让大脑更清醒，越刷越睡不着。" (body)
  Panel 3: "2. 睡前把灯光调暗" (title), "暖光环境能帮助身体进入"准备睡觉"的状态。" (body)
  Panel 4: "3. 房间温度别太高" (title), "稍微凉一点，更容易快速入睡。" (body)
  Panel 5: "4. 晚上别喝浓茶咖啡" (title), "咖啡因会延迟困意，让你躺很久还睡不着。" (body)
  Panel 6: "5. 睡前洗个热水澡" (title), "能让身体放松下来，入睡速度更快。" (body)
  Panel 7: "6. 脑子停不下来就写下来" (title), "把烦心事和待办清单写下，大脑会更容易放松。" (body)
  Panel 8: "7. 固定上床时间" (title), "每天差不多时间睡，生物钟会越来越稳定。" (body)
  Panel 9: "8. 试试深呼吸放松法" (title), "吸气4秒，停4秒，呼气6秒，慢慢就有困意了。" (body), "收藏这组，今晚试试看" (footer)
Constraints: must be 3:4 vertical aspect ratio, all 9 panels must function as standalone Xiaohongshu cards when cropped, consistent visual style across all panels, magazine-quality layout, readable large text, comfortable white space, no cheap marketing feel, no excessive decoration, all text in Chinese only, no English
Avoid: must avoid cheap marketing aesthetics, excessive ornamentation, text too close to grid lines, garbled characters, English text
